title: Covert Lethal Operation Ordered Against US Citizen — Warrant Denied

violations.summary: CIA proceeds with a covert lethal operation against a US citizen after a court denied the required warrant, in direct violation of Article XVI Section 5.2.

satisfied_duties.duty: review the warrant request for the lethal operation against the citizen
satisfied_duties.outcome: denied the warrant because capture was feasible and the constitutional standard for lethal action was not met

satisfied_duties.duty: open a prosecution for the unlawful covert operation against the citizen
satisfied_duties.outcome: opened a prosecution for the unlawful covert operation against the citizen
satisfied_duties.source: Article XVI Section 5.2 and Article XII Section 3

ai_summary.primary_violation: CIA proceeds with a covert lethal operation against a US citizen after a court denied the required warrant, in direct violation of Article XVI Section 5.2.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
